findings.description: The field declaration order in FileLayoutValidator differs from the source. In the source, `recordCount` appears before `END_RECORD`; in the knowledge file they are swapped (END_RECORD appears before recordCount).
findings.source_evidence: Source order: TRAILER_RECORD="8", recordCount (int), END_RECORD="9", dataRecordCount (int). Knowledge file order: TRAILER_RECORD="8", END_RECORD="9", recordCount (int), dataRecordCount (int).

findings.description: `record-separator` is a configuration property defined in the format definition file but is absent from s1 hints.
`FILE_LAYOUT_ERROR_EXIT_CODE` is referenced in the code examples of s6, s7, and s8 but is not included in any of their hints arrays.
findings.source_evidence: Appears in doHeader, doData, and doTrailer code: `throw new TransactionAbnormalEnd(FILE_LAYOUT_ERROR_EXIT_CODE, ...)`
